description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9.4 Docker image. Define two stages: test and build, and cache the node_modules/ directory. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm install -g yarn, yarn install, yarn run test, and yarn run lint. In the build stage add a build job that first runs apt-get update -y && apt-get install -y zip, then npm install -g yarn, yarn install, and yarn run package, and publishes the files build/passvault.zip and build/passvault.xpi as artifacts. The pipeline has no special rules, so both jobs run on all branches.
